screening_report.advisory_notice: This report is advisory decision support only. It does not approve or reject any application. Human Thai FDA officers remain responsible for regulatory decisions.

findings.name: Toilet near production area
findings.explanation: Advisory finding: toilet area is approximately 20.0 plan units from production area, below the review threshold of 80.0.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm physical separation, door orientation, ventilation, handwashing access, and sanitation controls before any regulatory decision.

findings.name: Waste flow crossing product flow
findings.explanation: Advisory finding: waste flow intersects product flow in the submitted floor-plan annotation.
findings.recommended_action: Review routing, barriers, timing controls, and waste handling procedures with a human officer.

findings.name: Raw material storage close to finished product storage
findings.explanation: Advisory finding: raw material storage is approximately 20.0 plan units from finished product storage, below the review threshold of 130.0.
findings.recommended_action: Verify segregation, directional flow, labeling, and handling controls.

findings.name: Window opening directly to production area
findings.explanation: Advisory review flag: a window is approximately 0.0 plan units from production area.
findings.recommended_action: Review screening, sealing, airflow, and contamination prevention controls.

findings.name: Waste area close to clean zone
findings.explanation: Advisory finding: waste area is approximately 30.0 plan units from a clean zone, below the review threshold of 120.0.
findings.recommended_action: Review waste segregation, removal path, containment, cleaning frequency, and physical separation.

findings.name: Unknown or unlabeled room near production
findings.explanation: Advisory uncertainty: an unknown or unlabeled room is approximately 20.0 plan units from production area.
findings.recommended_action: Ask the applicant to clarify the room function and review the layout manually.
